## Checklist

- [ ] `swift test --parallel` passes locally
- [ ] `swiftlint lint --strict Sources/GRump/` is clean
- [ ] No `print()` in `Sources/GRump/` — used `GRumpLogger` instead
- [ ] Updated docs / `CHANGELOG.md` if behavior changed
- [ ] Added or updated tests for behavior changes
- [ ] Screenshots or a clip attached for UI changes
